projectDescription: A NodeJS extension host for Vim and Neovim that brings full LSP 3.17 support and a VSCode-compatible extension ecosystem to your editor.
keyFeatures: Full LSP 3.17 protocol support including completion, diagnostics, code actions, hover, rename, and semantic tokens
VSCode-compatible extension ecosystem — install and run coc extensions via :CocInstall
Runs in a separate NodeJS process to keep Vim/Neovim fast and responsive
Configurable via JSON settings file (coc-settings.json) like VS Code
Snippet support with TextMate-compatible snippet expansion
Built-in language client for connecting to any LSP-compliant language server
CocList — a fuzzy-finder UI for diagnostics, symbols, commands, and more
Tree view, inline completion, inlay hints, semantic highlighting, and call hierarchy
publicApiSurface: workspace — document management, configuration, file watchers, workspace folders
window — UI utilities: messages, quickpick, input, output channels, status bar
languages — register LSP providers (completion, hover, definition, etc.)
commands — register and execute Vim/coc commands
events — subscribe to editor lifecycle events
extensions — manage and interact with installed coc extensions
diagnosticManager — programmatic access to diagnostic collections
snippetManager — trigger and manage snippet expansion
LanguageClient — connect to external language servers via LSP
BasicList — base class for creating custom CocList entries
